title: campanula indica
intro: Campanula indica, also known as the Canterbury bells, is a flowering plant belonging to the bellflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Campanula indica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Campanula indica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
